extracted_information: The Monaco Editor is the code editor powering VS Code, licensed under MIT. It supports major desktop browsers and offers features like IntelliSense, syntax colorization, and a diff editor. Mobile browser support is not available. The latest version is 0.53.0.

features.name: IntelliSense, Validation
features.description: Get completions and errors directly in the browser for supported languages. Supports writing custom completion providers in JavaScript.

features.name: Basic Syntax Colorization
features.description: Colorize code using pre-built syntax highlighting or configure custom colorization.

features.name: Diff Editor
features.description: Provides side-by-side live comparison, supporting all languages out of the box.

references.description: A good page describing the code editor's features.
